name: Delhi Mussoorie Tour
overview: Explore the best of Delhi, Mussoorie, Rishikesh with our expertly crafted tour package. Mother India Tour Travels provides comfortable AC vehicles, experienced guides, and hand-picked accommodations to make your journey unforgettable.
inclusions: Accommodation in listed or similar hotels
All transfers and sightseeing by private AC vehicle
All long distance travel as per itinerary
Chauffeur, Toll Taxes, Parking, Fuel charges
State Taxes, Green Taxes, Road Taxes
exclusions: Personal expenses (porterage, tips, laundry, mineral water)
Monument entrance fees and camera charges
Any activity not mentioned in inclusions
Additional cost due to flight cancellation, roadblocks, political unrest
notes: Taj Mahal is closed every Friday
Prices are per person on twin sharing basis

itinerary.title: Delhi – Mussoorie (270 Kms
itinerary.description: Delhi – Mussoorie (270 Kms. Approx. 7 hours): Welcome to Delhi airport/station and proceed to Mussoorie. On arrival check in to your hotel. Remainder of the evening at leisure. Overnight in Mussoorie.

itinerary.title: Mussoorie – Sightseeing: After breakfast, explore local sightseeing and tour in
itinerary.description: Mussoorie – Sightseeing: After breakfast, explore local sightseeing and tour in Mussoorie. See the famous plunging Kempty Falls, Gun hillside factor offering breathtaking views of the Himalayas ranges and also the doon valley. You can appreciate shopping at Shopping center road. Evening is free for pastime.Overnight in Mussoorie.

itinerary.title: Mussoorie – Corbett (250 kms
itinerary.description: Mussoorie – Corbett (250 kms. Approx. 6 hrs): Today after the morning meal proceed to your journey to the jungles of Corbett. On arrival check in to your hotel. You might pick to enjoy the evening safari on your own at an additional cost. Jim Corbett National Park is known for pets like tigers, elephants, sambar, chitals, nilgai and 600 different species of birds. Overnight in Corbett.

itinerary.title: Corbett– Nainital (150 kms; Approximate 6 hrs) After breakfast, look into and pr
itinerary.description: Corbett– Nainital (150 kms; Approximate 6 hrs) After breakfast, look into and proceed to early morning safari. After that proceed to Nainital. On arrival check in to your hotel. You have the rest of the day at leisure.Overnight in Nainital.

itinerary.title: Nainital Sightseeing: Today after breakfast, proceed to check out Naina Devi Tem
itinerary.description: Nainital Sightseeing: Today after breakfast, proceed to check out Naina Devi Temple, Hanuman Garhi, Naina Height where one can delight in the breathtaking views of snow-capped Mountain range & Nainital Valley. Evening visit the local market at the Shopping centaur roadway where one can shop for different kinds of candles. Overnight in Nainital.

itinerary.title: Nainital – Delhi (Approx
itinerary.description:
Nainital – Delhi (Approx. 9 hrs): Today after breakfast, transfer to Delhi Airport terminal/ Railway Station to board your flight/train to your next destination or hometown.
